# ADL Law Associates

> Law firm based in Islamabad, Pakistan, providing legal representation in criminal, civil, family, ADR/mediation, anti-narcotics, and corporate law matters.

## About
ADL Law Associates is led by Advocate Riffat Jan, offering legal consultation and representation across Pakistan with over 10 years of combined experience.

## Services
- Criminal Law defense
- Civil Law disputes and contracts
- ADR (Mediation)
- Family Law (divorce, custody)
- Anti-Narcotics cases
- Corporate legal services

## Contact
- Email: hazratrifat@gmail.com
- Phone: 0345-9588005
- Address: Office No.16, Farhan Plaza, G-11 Markaz, Islamabad, Pakistan
- Website: https://adllawassociates.pk
